description: Letter from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu to Dāwūd b. Yehuda ha-Kohen asking him to read out a letter of condolence—enclosed with the present letter—to Moshe ha-Kohen and his son Salāma (the tax-farmer of Manūf) in Malīj. He excuses himself from traveling due to his illnesses. Shelomo sends his regards to his sister Sitt al-Riyāsa and her siblings and her mother.
tags: damin, illness letter 969-1517, Illness, illness: excuse
